---
title: "Ugly plots"
---

Mirror, mirror on the wall, who has the ugliest plot of them all?

::: {.panel-tabset}

## R + ggplot2

```{r}
#| out-width: "80%"
#| echo: false
#| fig-alt: Ugly plots created with ggplot2.
ugly_plot_r_paths <- fs::dir_ls(
  "images/ugly-plots-r",
  regexp = "*md",
  invert = TRUE
)
knitr::include_graphics(ugly_plot_r_paths)
```

## Python + plotnine

```{r}
#| out-width: "80%"
#| echo: false
#| fig-alt: Ugly plots created with plotnine.
ugly_plot_py_paths <- fs::dir_ls(
  "images/ugly-plots-py",
  regexp = "*md",
  invert = TRUE
)
knitr::include_graphics(ugly_plot_py_paths)
```

:::
